introSection: Adventure Drive is a steel launched roller coaster located at Suzuka Circuit in Suzuka, Mie, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride consists of many small banked turns and two cable launches. The speed of the launches are determined by how loud the riders scream.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 10 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Adventure Drive is a steel launched roller coaster located at Suzuka Circuit in Suzuka, Mie, Japan.

The ride consists of many small banked turns and two cable launches. The speed of the launches are determined by how loud the riders scream.

10 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
